channel.title: NLP on Hamza imloul
channel.description: Recent content in NLP on Hamza imloul

item.title: NLP from Sequential to Attention models
item.description: Introduction Natural Language Processing (NLP) is a vital part of Artificial Intelligence (AI) that helps computers understand and use language effectively. Recently, there have been exciting advancements in NLP using Deep Learning approaches, which has led to impressive performance on language-based tasks. One of the most exciting developments in this field is the creation of Large Language Models (LLMs), which have caught the attention of many people. In this article, we will explore these models and approaches in-depth, focusing on how they can help us with NLP tasks.
